title: malty juicy uruguayan casabe skillet
description: a hearty, comforting skillet dish featuring malty casabe, a traditional uruguayan staple. perfect for post-workout refueling on a keto diet.

ingredients.name: red wine
ingredients.notes: optional, for added depth of flavor

instructions: heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. add the garlic and saut 3 until fragrant, about 1 minute.
add the short ribs and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. remove the ribs from the skillet and set aside.
lower the heat to medium and add the crushed casabe to the skillet. cook, stirring occasionally, until the casabe is lightly toasted and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
add the chicken broth, red wine, thyme, salt, and pepper to the skillet. stir to combine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the skillet.
return the short ribs to the skillet and bring the mixture to a simmer.
cover the skillet and transfer it to the preheated oven. braise the short ribs until tender and falling off the bone, about 2 hours.
remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool slightly. serve the short ribs and casabe mixture hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
